---
title: "Bebop Data - ZK"
author: "Zo Kupelian"
date: "2026-06-24"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r}
#establishing characteristics of data 

FET <- read.csv("FET_OK.csv")  #loading in Final Edition Tested dataset from Olivia
head(FET)                   #looking at 1st 10 rows
nrow(FET)                   #how many ticks we have data for 

sum(is.na(FET$latitude))    #how many latitude data points we're missing
sum(is.na(FET$longitude))   #how many longitude data points we're missinh
```

```{r}
print("Please tell me that worked...")
```
